Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf used by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
    Class
    Description
    ThymeleafDispatcher
    Flavor-neutral worker bean carrying the Thymeleaf raw-template-dispatch logic shared by the ThymeleafMixin mixin, the ThymeleafServlet servlet, and the ThymeleafResource child flavors.
    ThymeleafDispatcher.Builder
    Builder for ThymeleafDispatcher.
    ThymeleafMixin
    Mixin that wires Thymeleaf view-rendering onto any Juneau REST resource.
    ThymeleafMixin.Builder
    Builder for ThymeleafMixin.
    ThymeleafView
    Immutable value class returned from @RestOp-annotated methods to ask the framework to render a Thymeleaf template.
